items.title: 5 Dividend Powerhouses That Belong in Every Retirement Portfolio Right Now
items.description: For investors approaching or in retirement, the right stock portfolio balances reliable income, low volatility, and consistent dividend growth. Among six prominent dividend-paying stocks, five stand out for their financial stability, income generation, and defensive characteristics that help retirees navigate market turbulence. items.description: PG faces tariff pressures despite cost cuts and price hikes, while strong cash flow supports $15B in fiscal 2026 shareholder returns.

items.title: Procter & Gamble Drops 11.9% in 3 Months: Buy the Dip or Stay Wary?
items.description: PG's slide to fresh lows underscores softening demand and fierce discounting, leaving investors debating whether its premium valuation still holds up.
